Your Trip. Your Crew. Your Story.

The social golf app built for the guys who play every weekend and live for the annual trip.

Download on the App Store

What is Mulligan Crew?

Golf is better with your crew.

Mulligan Crew is built for recreational golfers — the ones with a regular Saturday group and an annual bucket list trip. Track scores, run bets, plan tee times, and build a history of every round you've ever played together.

Features

Everything your crew needs on the course.

⛳

Live Scoring

Track up to 4 players simultaneously. Eagle, birdie, par, and snowman tallies update in real time as the round unfolds.

✈️

Trip Planner

Organize every detail of your golf trip — tee times, groupings, lodging, dinner reservations, cost tracking, and a crew group chat all in one place.

🏆

Championship Mode

Turn your final round into a tournament. Top performers earn starting score advantages. The stakes get real.

💰

Bets & Side Games

Beer bets, money pots, long drive — built right in. Run your crew's side action the way it deserves to be run.

🔥

Momentum Banners

Heating Up and Ice Cold banners track who's on a run and who's melting down — updated every 3 holes.

📖

Crew History

Every round saved forever. All-time stats, crew leaderboards, course records, and player badges earned over time.

The App

Built for the course. Loved after the round.
